title: CensorSigns
description: A plugin that censors bad words on signs
body:
**CensorSigns: Keep Your Minecraft Server Signs Family-Friendly**

CensorSigns is a lightweight but powerful Minecraft server plugin designed to automatically detect and filter inappropriate language on signs. This plugin provides server administrators with the tools they need to maintain a clean, family-friendly environment without having to constantly monitor player-created signage.

Key Features

**🛡️ Comprehensive Filtering System**

Customizable Banned Word List: Easily add, remove, or modify the words that should be censored through the configuration file.

Smart Word Detection: Identifies inappropriate words even when players try to bypass filters with special characters or spacing.

Context-Aware Filtering: Distinguishes between acceptable uses of words and inappropriate contexts to minimize false positives.


**⚙️ Flexible Configuration Options**

Customizable Censoring Style: Choose whether to replace entire words or maintain word length with replacement characters.

Replacement Character Selection: Set any character as your preferred censoring symbol (* by default).

Permission-Based Bypassing: Grant trusted players permission to bypass the filter when necessary.

**👮 Staff Notification System**

Real-Time Alerts: Staff members receive instant notifications when players attempt to place signs with inappropriate content.

Customizable Notification Messages: Personalize the format and content of staff alerts.

Detailed Logging: Optional logging of all censoring actions for administrative review.

**🚀 Performance Optimized**

Minimal Impact: Designed with performance in mind, ensuring no server lag or slowdowns.

Memory Efficient: Consumes minimal resources while maintaining effectiveness.

Compatible: Works seamlessly with other plugins and across multiple Minecraft versions.

**🧩 Administrator Tools**

Simple Commands: Easy-to-use commands for reloading configuration and viewing plugin information.

Permission System: Granular permission nodes for different administrative functions.
**
Why Choose This Plugin?**
Server administrators face the challenge of maintaining appropriate content in their communities while allowing creative freedom. This plugin offers the perfect balance by automatically filtering inappropriate content on signs while being completely customizable to fit your server's specific needs and community standards.

The plugin integrates seamlessly into your existing server setup with minimal configuration required, though more advanced customization options are available for those who want fine-grained control over the filtering system.

Whether you're running a family-friendly public server, a school environment, or simply want to maintain certain standards of language among your players, this plugin provides the tools you need to enforce those standards consistently and automatically.

By implementing this plugin, you'll save valuable administrative time that would otherwise be spent monitoring and removing inappropriate signs, allowing you to focus on more important aspects of server management and community building.
